file_insights.description: Comprehensive test suite for AI recommendation impact scoring algorithm
Core implementation of recommendation impact scoring algorithm

patterns_discovered: Weighted scoring system with four key factors
Modular scoring approach for AI recommendation impact
Comprehensive test coverage with mock data generation
Scoring calculation based on multiple input parameters
gotchas_discovered: Need for precise score normalization across different factors
Handling edge cases like empty input arrays
Balancing score calculations to prevent over/under-weighting
recommendations: Maintain comprehensive test suite for scoring algorithm
Consider adding more edge case tests
Document scoring methodology and weights clearly
Implement logging to track scoring calculations
Create visualization tools for understanding score breakdown
